name: Lemon Snow
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients except crushed ice into a blender container.
2. Cover and blend on high speed for 30 seconds.
3. Remove the cover and continue to blend while adding ice. Blend for another 30 seconds to 1 minute, or until the mixture reaches the consistency of fine snow.
4. If the blending stops, carefully use a rubber spatula to break the surface without dipping too deeply. This will help restart the blending action.
5. Spoon the mixture immediately into sherbet glasses and serve with a small spoon.
